message:
feat(engine): S3FIFO cache trace corpus, policy baseline, and adoption wedge in module_cache

Expand module_cache with three major subsystems (+1309 source, +111 test lines):

Cache Trace Corpus:
- CacheWorkloadClass enum (ColdCompile, WarmRun, PackageGraph, ReactApp, ScanHeavy)
- CacheLocalityClass enum (Hot, Warm, Scan) for classifying access patterns
- CacheTraceAccess: individual access records with sequence numbers and locality
- CacheTraceCorpus: collection of traces with canonical value computation
  and schema versioning (CACHE_TRACE_CORPUS_SCHEMA_VERSION)

Cache Policy Baseline:
- CachePolicyBaseline: reference measurements for evaluating cache
  replacement policies against workload traces
- CachePolicyBaselineBuilder: fluent API for constructing baselines
  from trace corpora with hit-rate and eviction metrics
- CACHE_POLICY_BASELINE_SCHEMA_VERSION constant

S3FIFO Adoption Wedge:
- S3FIFO implementation with small/main/ghost queues following the
  FIFO-based admission policy from the S3-FIFO paper
- S3FifoAdoptionWedge: evaluation harness comparing S3FIFO against
  LRU baseline across workload traces
- Adoption verdict with improvement ratios and per-workload breakdowns
- S3FIFO_ADOPTION_WEDGE_SCHEMA_VERSION constant

Integration tests verify corpus construction, baseline computation,
S3FIFO eviction behavior, and adoption wedge verdicts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
